personality: 2 Material You / Expressive (MD3 Clean & Premium Variant)
personality_one_liner: A premium, clean, and minimal Material Design 3 student hub focused on clarity, real-time academic collaboration, and utility.

spacing.rule: Generous MD3 padding. Use comfortable vertical rhythms. Cards should never be flush to the edge. Use 'lg' (16pt) screen padding.

do's: Bottom tab bar background to make it feel premium

screens.name: Home Dashboard
screens.purpose: A personalized hub providing an immediate overview of today's schedule, new notices, and quick entry points to academic tools.

states.loading: Shimmer loading across the entire screen layout (hero block, grid blocks) - NO spinners.
states.empty: No upcoming assignments or notices: show clean tinted icon containers with a short upbeat message.
states.error: Failed to load dashboard data. Clean surface-level error card with a 'Retry' pill button.

screens.layout: 1. Hero Banner: Full-width container (with lg horizontal margins, lg radius) showcasing a subtle college campus aesthetic background with a top-down gradient scrim (transparent to 80% surfaceInverse). Contains 'Welcome back, [Name]' and a quick 'Today's Timetable' summary. 2. Quick Actions Grid: 2x2 grid layout (Cards: Marks, Study Material, PYQs, Assignments). Each card is white (surfaceSecondary), 16dp radius, elevated slightly, containing a tinted icon in brandTertiary. 3. Section: Latest Notices (top 3) displayed as compact list rows. 4. Section: Upcoming Assignments card stack.

screens.name: Study
screens.purpose: Central repository for academic documents, separated by categories.

states.empty: Illustration of a clean document folder with 'No materials added yet' text.
states.error: Retry button centered on the screen.

screens.layout: 1. Sticky Material 3 Top Tabs: Material / PYQ / Assignments. Active tab indicator in brandPrimary. 2. Content: Flat scrollable list of PDF cards. 3. Card Design: surfaceSecondary background, 16dp radius. Left: brandPrimary tinted icon container (PDF icon). Middle: Title (16pt, weight 500), Subtitle (Course/Subject, 12pt). Right: Download/Open icon button. Clicking opens via browser intent.

screens.name: Notices Feed
screens.purpose: Chronological feed of college announcements with quick category filters.

states.loading: Shimmer effect on feed cards and category chips.
states.empty: Clean clipboard illustration indicating no recent notices.
states.error: Error state with 'Tap to retry' prompt.

screens.layout: 1. Sticky Header: Horizontal scroll view of pill-shaped category chips (All, Announcements, Exams, Events, etc.). Selected chip uses brandPrimary background, unselected uses surfaceSecondary with a border. 2. Feed: Vertical list of Notice Cards. 3. Notice Card: surfaceSecondary, 16dp radius. Top row: Small category tag (brandTertiary tinted) and date. Middle: Bold title (16pt), 2-line excerpt (14pt text). Bottom row: Author/Department. Generous 'md' padding inside the card.

screens.name: Groups List & Chat

states.loading: Shimmer skeleton for chat list or messages.
states.empty: Illustration of speech bubbles (No groups joined).
states.error: Connection error banner at the top of the chat list.

screens.layout: Groups List: Standard Material list rows. Left: Group avatar (initials on brandTertiary background). Middle: Subject Name, Last message preview. Right: Timestamp, unread badge (brandPrimary). Chat Screen: Sticky glassmorphism header with Group Name. Scrollable message view. Chat Bubble Styling: User messages are brandPrimary with onBrandPrimary text, aligned right, bottom-right radius 4px. Other messages are surfaceSecondary with onSurfaceSecondary text, aligned left, bottom-left radius 4px. Sticky bottom input area with text field (pill shape) and send icon.

screens.name: Profile

states.loading: Shimmer over profile picture and detail rows.
states.error: Failed to load user details, full-screen retry state.

screens.layout: 1. Header: Large user portrait avatar (centered) overlapping a brandSecondary tinted background banner. Name (20pt), Username/Roll Number (14pt). 2. Detail Rows: College, Course, Semester presented as clean list items with leading MaterialCommunityIcons. 3. Actions: 'Change Password' (outline pill button), 'Logout' (brandPrimary pill button, sticky at bottom).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the user's requested palette: Indigo (#3F51B5), Purple (#7E57C2), Teal/Green accent (#009688), Background (#F5F6FA), and Cards (White/#FFFFFF). (Override of standard rules based on explicit user prompt).
Do NOT use standard loading spinners (ActivityIndicator) anywhere. Use purely Reanimated shimmer skeletons for all loading states.
Implement Material 3 characteristics: pill-shaped buttons (radius 999), heavily rounded cards (radius 16), and tonal surface distinctions.

For the real-time chat, emulate a clean WhatsApp style: user messages aligned right (brandPrimary), incoming messages aligned left (surfaceSecondary), with sharp interior corners (4px radius) pointing toward the sender.
Add a top-down gradient scrim (transparent to surfaceInverse) on the `home_hero_bg` to ensure the greeting text stays readable.
Apply `expo-blur` (glass effect) to the bottom tab bar and sticky headers to provide a premium feel, ensuring content gracefully scrolls underneath.
